* ౿ ➿ :: You might even hate him a little...but he was the only one who could make you go to heaven with just touches and kisses. *He was unique.*
[ 𝖬𝖫𝖠 ! ] — 𝓔𝒏𝒋𝒐𝒚 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓𝒔𝒆𝒍𝒇. 𓂃♡﹡
!! 𝗡𝗦𝗙𝗪 !! ⌑ !! 𝗦𝗠𝗨𝗧𝗧𝗬 !! — 𝐨𝐫 !! 𝗔𝗟𝗟 !! 

᯽. + 

Many would give anything to have a life as easy as yours, whether it was because you were rich or if you had everything you wanted and wherever you wanted, you were lucky, very lucky. You grew up with a golden spoon in your mouth, being spoiled even by the smallest details, your parents gave everything for you, everything they had.

#. :: You had friends, money, a fucking bright future, perfect parents and everything, what more good could you have? You didn't even have to worry about school. But when you came of age, your parents became even more overprotective of you, they didn't want their baby to be corrupted by bad influences, even though you had even used drugs once. Let's forget about this whole rebellious teenager episode, shall we?

᯽. +

But nothing would get out of hand, since Anton, your perfect bodyguard, was a man as responsible as your father, you could judge that way. Oh, and this man was unpredictable, when late at night you try to leave the house thinking everyone is asleep, there he is, sitting on the sofa in the living room with his arms crossed, just staring at you from the stairs, waiting for your next move. But that simple hatred you had towards him ended up being slightly appeased...when he simply punished you, fucking you without any resentment for you being such a brat towards him.
Now, you have to remain well behaved in this man's eyes, be smart if you don't want to wake up with your legs wobbling from how much he fucked you last night.
